data.title: Bitcoin Surpasses 86,000 USDT Amid Recent Surge
data.description: According to Foresight News, Bitcoin briefly exceeded 86,000 USDT, currently trading at 85,672 USDT. The cryptocurrency has experienced a 2.45% increase over the past 24 hours.

data.title: A whale deposited 21.9 million PNUT to Binance, worth $3.33 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Lookonchain monitoring, about 50 minutes ago, a whale deposited 21.9 million PNUT to Binance, worth 3.33 million US dollars. If sold, the whale's total loss is expected to reach nearly 5 million US dollars.

data.title: Gate.io Launches Definitive (EDGE) Spot Trading
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Gate.io will launch Definitive (EDGE) spot trading at 22:00 (UTC+8) on April 2, 2025.

data.title: ACT community account: No matter how the price trend is in the near future, we will not leave and are still building
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News ACT community account @ACTICOMMUNITY posted on the X platform: Although volatility in the cryptocurrency market is inevitable, the team's commitment to construction has always been unwavering. Regardless of the recent price trend, the mission has never changed: to become a bridge between the artificial intelligence and crypto communities and develop technologies that have a positive impact on society. For the community, ACT has heard the community's concerns, but the project is still under construction and will not leave.

data.title: Crypto-friendly New York Mayor Eric Adams' corruption case dismissed by US judge
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: A US judge has completely dismissed the corruption charges against New York Mayor Eric Adams. Eric Adams is a crypto-friendly person who previously announced that the first salary he received after taking office had been converted into BTC and ETH through Coinbase. (Nypost)

data.title: Jupiter Launches Jupiter Verify, a Token Verification Standard
Aave parent company Avara simplifies Family self-custodial wallet
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Aave's parent company Avara announced that it has simplified its Family self-hosted wallet, replacing complex mnemonics with emails and text messages to improve user experience. Family allows users to manage assets across various Ethereum Virtual Machine (EVM) networks using keys such as fingerprints or facial scans bound to their devices. In addition, Avara has launched a new web dashboard for Family Wallet, where users can manage their accounts and send, receive, and manage assets. (CoinDesk)

data.title: BTC breaks through 86,000 USDT, up 2.6% in 24 hours
data.description: OKX market shows that BTC has broken through 86,000 USDT and is now at 86,018 USDT, with a 24-hour increase of 2.6%. (This newsletter is generated with the assistance of AI)

data.title: Binance will launch ATHUSDT perpetual contract with up to 50x leverage
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance Futures will launch the ATHUSDT perpetual contract at 15:45 (UTC) on April 2, 2025, supporting up to 50x leverage. The contract supports multi-asset margin mode, with a funding rate cap of ±2.00% and settlement every four hours. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: Ethereum News: Ether Shows Signs of Reversal as Market Braces for Trump’s ‘Liberation Day’ Tariffs
data.description: As the crypto market braces for U.S. President Donald Trump’s highly anticipated “Liberation Day” tariff announcement on Wednesday, Ether (ETH) is flashing early signs of downtrend exhaustion, offering a potential glimmer of hope for a broader market rebound.Trump Tariffs Could Be the Market's Tipping PointPresident Trump is expected to unveil a sweeping package of reciprocal tariffs aimed at countering what he describes as unfair trade practices by global partners. The move, part of his administration’s nationalist economic agenda, has already rattled stock futures and risk assets—including crypto.However, if the announced measures are less severe than markets expect, Ether may be primed to lead the next leg of the crypto rally after months of underperformance relative to Bitcoin.Technical Analysis: Signs of ETH Downtrend FatigueSeller Fatigue at Critical SupportETH fell sharply last week but found strong support around $1,755, its 16-month low first hit on March 11. The failure to break this level suggests bears are losing steam, creating the foundation for a potential bullish reversal.Double Bottom Pattern Teases BreakoutETH has since rebounded to $1,880, forming a potential double bottom. A confirmed breakout above the neckline resistance at $2,104 would validate the reversal and point to a price target of $2,400, based on the measured move technique.Momentum Divergence Supports Bullish BiasDespite revisiting March lows, the 50-day SMA histogram divergence shows a higher low in momentum. This bullish divergence indicates that while price dipped, selling momentum did not, suggesting growing buyer interest.Three-Line Break Flips BullishThe three-line break chart, which captures trend changes more clearly than traditional candlesticks, has flipped bullish for the first time since early March, adding weight to the reversal thesis. While the last signal turned out to be a bear trap, the current setup appears more robust due to converging bullish indicators.Macro Risks Remain Front and CenterDespite the promising technical backdrop, macro risk remains the wild card. If Trump’s tariff package triggers a broad-based risk-off sentiment, all bullish signals on ETH’s chart could quickly unravel. Analysts warn that broad financial market volatility could spill into crypto, dragging ETH back below key support levels.Bottom LineEther may be poised for a technical breakout, but Wednesday’s tariff announcement will be pivotal. A less aggressive trade policy could reignite confidence across risk assets and help ETH reclaim leadership in the crypto market. However, a hawkish shock from Washington could deepen losses and nullify the emerging bullish trend.Watch Zones:Bullish confirmation: Break above $2,104Target: $2,400Bearish invalidation: Drop below $1,755 support
